user.title: Battery Optimizer Light Sonnen
user.description: Enter connection information for your Sonnen battery.

data_description.host: Local IP address of your Sonnen battery. Usually found in your router or via the Sonnen app.
data_description.api_token: Required to control the battery. Log in to your battery's web interface (via its IP address) as 'user', select 'Software integration' and enable 'JSON API' (both Read and Write). Copy your Auth-Token from there. See also [this guide]({api_token_url}).

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Check that IP address, port, and API token are correct and that the battery is reachable on the network.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Configure connection settings and automatic control behavior.

data_description.host: Local IP address of your Sonnen battery.
data_description.auto_control: If enabled, the integration automatically listens to 'sensor.optimizer_light_action' from Battery Optimizer Light and controls the battery accordingly (Charge, Discharge, Pause, Auto). This eliminates the need for a separate automation.
